glosses.ro: a fi alcătuit din; a implica

sentences.target: Le jeu consiste à poser des cartes.
sentences.reading: /lə ʒø kɔ̃sist a poze de kaʁt/

translations.fr: Le jeu consiste à poser des cartes.
translations.ipa: /lə ʒø kɔ̃sist a poze de kaʁt/
translations.en: The game is about laying down cards.
translations.es: El juego consiste en colocar cartas.
translations.de: Das Spiel besteht darin, Karten auszulegen.
translations.it: Il gioco consiste nel mettere giù le carte.
translations.ru: Игра заключается в том, чтобы выкладывать карты.
translations.pt: O jogo consiste em baixar cartas.
translations.vi: Trò chơi là đặt các lá bài xuống.
translations.ar: اللعبة تقوم على وضع أوراق اللعب.
translations.nl: Het spel draait om kaarten neerleggen.
translations.uk: Гра полягає в тому, щоб викладати карти.
translations.hu: A játék lényege a kártyák lerakása.
translations.hi: खेल में ताश के पत्ते रखना होता है.
translations.el: Το παιχνίδι συνίσταται στο να ρίχνεις χαρτιά.
translations.nb: Spillet går ut på å legge ned kort.
translations.sv: Spelet går ut på att lägga kort.
translations.ro: Jocul constă în a pune cărți pe masă.
translations.da: Spillet går ud på at lægge kort.
translations.fi: Pelin idea on laittaa kortteja pöytään.
translations.ja: このゲームはカードを出すことです。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine singular; determiners the noun 'jeu' as the subject.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the subject noun phrase.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; takes the construction 'consister à + infinitif' to express the activity.
Preposition introducing the infinitival complement of 'consiste'.
Infinitive verb; complement of 'consister à', denoting the action.
Indefinite plural article; determines 'cartes' as a non-specific plural direct object of 'poser'.
Common noun, feminine plural; direct object of the infinitive 'poser'.

sentences.target: Notre plan consiste à éviter les embouteillages.
sentences.reading: /nɔtʁ plɑ̃ kɔ̃sist a evite lez ɑ̃butɛjaʒ/

translations.fr: Notre plan consiste à éviter les embouteillages.
translations.ipa: /nɔtʁ plɑ̃ kɔ̃sist a evite lez ɑ̃butɛjaʒ/
translations.en: Our plan is to avoid traffic jams.
translations.es: Nuestro plan es evitar los atascos.
translations.de: Unser Plan ist, Staus zu vermeiden.
translations.it: Il nostro piano è evitare gli ingorghi.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们的计划是避免堵车。
translations.yue: 我哋嘅計劃係避開塞車。
translations.vi: Kế hoạch của chúng tôi là tránh tắc đường.
translations.nl: Ons plan is om files te vermijden.
translations.hu: A tervünk az, hogy elkerüljük a dugókat.
translations.hi: हमारी योजना ट्रैफिक जाम से बचने की है.
translations.pl: Nasz plan polega na unikaniu korków.
translations.el: Το σχέδιό μας είναι να αποφύγουμε το μποτιλιάρισμα.
translations.nb: Planen vår er å unngå trafikkork.
translations.sv: Vår план är att undvika trafikstockningar.
translations.ro: Planul nostru este să evităm aglomerația în trafic.
translations.cs: Náš plán je vyhnout se dopravním zácpám.
translations.da: Vores plan er at undgå trafikpropper.
translations.ja: 私たちの計画は渋滞を避けることです。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, 1st person plural; agrees with 'plan' (masculine singular).
Common noun, masculine singular; subject of 'consiste'.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; selects the pattern 'consister à + infinitif'.
Preposition introducing the infinitival complement.
Infinitive verb; complement of 'consister à', naming the action aimed at.
Definite article, plural; determines 'embouteillages' as a specific set.
Common noun, masculine plural; direct object of the infinitive 'éviter'.

sentences.target: Les étapes consistent en deux tâches simples.
sentences.reading: /lez etap kɔ̃sist ɑ̃ dø tɑʃ sɛ̃pl/

translations.fr: Les étapes consistent en deux tâches simples.
translations.ipa: /lez etap kɔ̃sist ɑ̃ dø tɑʃ sɛ̃pl/
translations.en: The steps consist of two simple tasks.
translations.es: Los pasos consisten en dos tareas sencillas.
translations.de: Die Schritte bestehen aus zwei einfachen Aufgaben.
translations.it: I passaggi consistono in due semplici compiti.
translations.ko: 단계는 두 가지 간단한 작업으로 구성됩니다.
translations.zh-Hans: 步骤由两个简单的任务组成。
translations.yue: 步驟包括兩個簡單嘅任務。
translations.ru: Этапы состоят из двух простых задач.
translations.pt: As etapas consistem em duas tarefas simples.
translations.vi: Các bước gồm hai nhiệm vụ đơn giản.
translations.nl: De stappen bestaan uit δύο eenvoudige taken.
translations.uk: Етапи складаються з двох простих завдань.
translations.hu: A lépések két egyszerű feladatból állnak.
translations.hi: चरणों में दो सरल कार्य शामिल हैं.
translations.pl: Etapy składają się z dwóch prostych zadań.
translations.el: Τα στάδια αποτελούνται από δύο απλές εργασίες.
translations.nb: Stegene består av to enkle oppgaver.
translations.id: Langkah-langkah terdiri dari dua tugas sederhana.
translations.sv: Stegen består av två enkla uppgifter.
translations.ro: Etapele constau în două sarcini simple.
translations.cs: Kroky se skládají ze dvou jednoduchých úkolů.
translations.da: Trinene består af to simple opgaver.
translations.ja: 手順は二つの簡単な作業から成ります。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, plural; determines the subject noun 'étapes'.
Common noun, feminine plural; head of the subject.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person plural; agrees with 'étapes' and takes 'consister en + nom' to express composition.
Preposition introducing the nominal complement of 'consistent'.
Cardinal numeral; quantifier modifying 'tâches'.
Common noun, feminine plural; complement of the preposition 'en' (content of what the stages consist in).
Adjective, feminine plural; modifies 'tâches'.

sentences.target: La réunion va consister à faire le point.
sentences.reading: /la ʁe.jy.njɔ̃ va kɔ̃siste a fɛʁ lə pwɛ̃/

translations.fr: La réunion va consister à faire le point.
translations.ipa: /la ʁe.jy.njɔ̃ va kɔ̃siste a fɛʁ lə pwɛ̃/
translations.en: The meeting will be to go over everything.
translations.es: La reunión será para repasar todo.
translations.de: Das Meeting wird dazu dienen, alles durchzugehen.
translations.it: La riunione servirà a fare il punto.
translations.pt: A reunião será para fazer um balanço.
translations.he: הישיבה תהיה כדי לעשות סדר בדברים.
translations.tr: Toplantı her şeyi gözden geçirmek için yapılacak.
translations.vi: Cuộc họp sẽ dùng để rà soát mọi việc.
translations.nl: De vergadering is om alles door te nemen.
translations.hu: A megbeszélés arra lesz, hogy mindent áttekintsünk.
translations.hi: बैठक का उद्देश्य सब कुछ की समीक्षा करना होगा.
translations.pl: Spotkanie będzie polegało na omówieniu wszystkiego.
translations.el: Η συνάντηση θα είναι για να κάνουμε απολογισμό.
translations.nb: Møtet skal gå ut på å gå gjennom alt.
translations.id: Rapat akan digunakan untuk meninjau semuanya.
translations.sv: Mötet kommer att gå ut på att gå igenom allt.
translations.ro: Întâlnirea va fi pentru a face bilanțul.
translations.cs: Schůzka bude sloužit к rekapitulaci všeho.
translations.da: Mødet går ud på at gennemgå det hele.
translations.fi: Kokouksen tarkoitus on käydä kaikki läpi.
translations.ja: 会議はすべてを確認するためのものです。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine singular; determines 'réunion'.
Common noun, feminine singular; subject of the clause.
Auxiliary, present indicative 3rd person singular; forms the futur proche with the infinitive 'consister'.
Infinitive main verb; complement of 'va' (aller) and takes 'à + infinitif' to specify the activity.
Preposition introducing the infinitival complement of 'consister'.
Infinitive verb; complement of 'consister à'.
Definite article, masculine singular; determines 'point'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'faire'.
